scripts.dev:backend: node scripts/check-port.js 3001 && cd backend && pnpm run dev
scripts.dev:frontend: node scripts/check-port.js 3000 && cd frontend && pnpm run dev
scripts.setup: pnpm run setup:backend && pnpm run setup:frontend
scripts.db:studio: cd backend && pnpm exec prisma studio
scripts.db:migrate: cd backend && pnpm exec prisma migrate dev
scripts.db:reset: cd backend && pnpm exec prisma migrate reset
